revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-1-025

a devise which transmits sound, intended to provide information to mariners during periods of restricted visibility.


Note: The term "Sound signal" is frequently used to describe the apparatus generating the sound. This use is deprecated.

{{IALAFooter}}
